summary: Tested Stock Summary Opening Balance bug fix and Carry Forward feature. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Opening column visible in Stock Summary with amber-colored values, 9 stock items in Settings, Carry Forward button functional.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: GET /api/stock-summary now includes 'opening' field fetched from db.opening_stock collection
Opening stock calculation: Available = Opening + In - Out is working correctly
STOCK_ITEMS in auth.py correctly includes 9 items: paddy, rice_usna, rice_raw, bran, kunda, broken, kanki, husk, frk
PUT /api/opening-stock correctly saves rice_usna and rice_raw separately (split from rice)
POST /api/opening-stock/carry-forward endpoint exists and requires admin role
StockSummary.jsx displays Opening column with amber color (text-amber-400) for all 3 category tables
Settings page OpeningStockForm shows all 9 stock item inputs with Carry Forward button
seed_data_creation: Opening stock for KMS 2024-2025 already set with paddy=500, rice_usna=300 (visible in Stock Summary)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Summary Opening Balance feature fully working. Opening column shows amber-colored values from db.opening_stock. Available = Opening + In - Out calculation verified. Carry Forward button in Settings allows auto-carry of previous year closing stock to current year opening stock.

stock_summary_opening_column.details: Opening column visible in all 3 category tables (Raw Material, Finished, By-Product) with amber color

opening_stock_api.details: GET/PUT /api/opening-stock working with 9 stock items including rice_usna and rice_raw

carry_forward_api.details: POST /api/opening-stock/carry-forward endpoint exists, requires admin, validates source/target years

available_calculation.details: Available = Opening + In - Out formula verified (Paddy: 500 + 0 - 0 = 500)

settings_opening_stock_form.details: 9 stock item inputs visible with Carry Forward button and Save button
